name: A Neuro-Symbolic Approach for Probabilistic Reasoning on Graph Data
summary: arXiv:2507.21873v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) excel at predictive tasks on graph-structured data but often lack the ability to incorporate symbolic domain knowled...
description: arXiv:2507.21873v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) excel at predictive tasks on graph-structured data but often lack the ability to incorporate symbolic domain knowledge and perform general reasoning. Relational Bayesian Networks (RBNs), in contrast, enable fully generative probabilistic modeling over graph-like structures and support rich symbolic knowledge and pr...
author: Raffaele Pojer, Andrea Passerini, Kim G. Larsen, Manfred Jaeger
